name: tcell-target-explorer
description: Discover, validate, listen, and remember novel CD4+ T-cell drug targets for autoimmune diseases from a genome-scale CRISPRi Perturb-seq screen (Marson/Pritchard 2025). Wires druggable regulator handles to a disease's own risk-gene modules, trust-gated by knockdown QC and activation state, adds live X/Twitter community signal for each lead, and keeps a learning knowledge base.

tools.name: disease_mechanisms
tools.description: DISCOVERY: druggable regulator handles wired to a disease's own risk-gene modules, per activation state — novel, testable leads.

tools.name: disease_targets
tools.description: Ranked candidate targets for a disease: enrichment odds ratio, GRN influence, trust flag, activation state, Th1/Th2.

tools.name: target_evidence
tools.description: The full 'why this target' case for one gene in one disease, with program peers and per-state trajectory.

tools.name: regulator_detail
tools.description: Per-condition GRN out-degree and CRISPRi QC (knockdown verified, off-target) for one regulator.

tools.name: state_profile
tools.description: How a regulator's GRN influence shifts across T-cell activation states (Rest/Stim8hr/Stim48hr).

tools.name: list_diseases
tools.description: List the autoimmune diseases with disease-enriched T-cell programs in the screen.

tools.name: community_signal
tools.description: LISTEN: recent X/Twitter chatter (labs/journals first) about a gene or disease — the bleeding-edge, pre-paper signal the literature can't see.

tools.name: kb_recall
tools.description: MEMORY: read what the knowledge base already knows about a gene or disease (incl. baked community signal) before re-deriving.

tools.name: kb_search
tools.description: MEMORY: fast lookup across the KB by name or attribute (has community signal / verdict), backed by an index.

tools.name: kb_remember
tools.description: MEMORY: file a finding to a gene's profile with provenance so it is never re-derived.

tools.name: kb_remember_signal
tools.description: MEMORY: harvest + file current community signal for a gene/disease so the pre-paper chatter is preserved.

tools.name: kb_verdict
tools.description: MEMORY: record the scientist's verdict on a target (the reputation signal).
